1.premise: Unprompted insults from a stranger invite equally savage comebacks.
Being called a rapist opens the door to calling her a victim.

2.premise: Saying you're not into fat chicks while she's visibly anorexic counts as a second insult.

lines.text: I was at the bar the other day, just getting a drink.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: And this big group of ladies came.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: and it was like a big group of ladies.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Because it was like a gaggle of bitches.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: So so many and I'm just sitting there minding my own business at the bar having a drink
lines.label: setup

lines.text: And one of them comes over and orders a drink and then looks at me and goes
lines.label: setup

lines.text: You should shave your face. You look like a rapist
lines.label: setup

lines.text: And I just yelled there said yeah, you look like a victim
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Got her got her got her ass
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: She didn't like that very much and she chime back she's like that's not funny and I'm like shut up bitch yes it is
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: But don't worry, I'm not into fat chicks,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: and she was clearly anorexic, so...got her again.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Yeah, we'll leave it at that.
lines.label: fluff
